## Checklist

- [ ] **API surface** — If this PR adds, removes, renames, or changes the meaning of a backend route (or how the dashboard calls it), update [`docs/api-status.md`](../docs/api-status.md) so the registry stays accurate.
- [ ] **Build** — `npm run build` passes.
- [ ] **i18n** — User-visible strings added or changed in English are mirrored in Arabic where applicable (`src/i18n.ts`).
